sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented. Sports game using Mode 7 pseudo-3D perspective.

special_mechanics.name: Ice Hockey Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls hockey players with standard ice hockey physics. Movement includes skating, directional control, and momentum-based deceleration typical of ice hockey gameplay.

special_mechanics.name: Puck Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Puck can be shot, passed, or dumped. Players can fake slap shots and aim shots to specific corners of net.

special_mechanics.name: Mode 7 Perspective
special_mechanics.description: Pseudo-3D viewpoint using SNES Mode 7 hardware feature, providing three-dimensional perspective of the ice rink similar to NCAA Basketball.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Game is a sports simulation with no documented movement parameters in available sources. Wikipedia article describes gameplay mechanics qualitatively but contains no quantified physics values (velocities, accelerations, gravity coefficients, etc.). TCRF source is not usable due to access restrictions.
